description_long: This object is a black desktop computer tower, featuring a rectangular, slightly trapezoidal shape with a flat top and sides. The front panel is glossy and includes several drive bays, a power button, and two circular ports, likely for audio or USB connections. The front also displays branding from Cooler Master and LG, indicating the presence of an optical drive. The sides and top are matte and unadorned, with subtle panel lines suggesting removable covers for internal access. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some plastic elements, typical for computer cases. This type of object is commonly found in offices, homes, or urban tech environments, often placed on or under desks.
description: A black desktop computer tower with a glossy front panel featuring drive bays, ports, and branding. The sides and top are matte and unadorned, giving it a sleek, modern appearance.
description_view_0: The left side of the computer tower, showing a flat, matte black surface with minimal detailing.
description_view_1: A narrow end view of the tower, highlighting its rectangular profile and flat top.
description_view_2: The right side of the tower, nearly identical to the left, with a flat, matte black surface.
description_view_3: The front of the tower, displaying drive bays, ports, and Cooler Master and LG branding on a glossy panel.
